_meta.description: Aqueduct compliance framework mapping — SDOH projects cross-referenced against regulatory, accreditation, and financial mandates

tax_exemption.description: IRC §501(c)(3) nonprofit hospital tax exemption vs. community benefit obligation

part_ii_does_not_count: Community Building Activities — unless evidence-based outcomes documented
schedule_h_parts.key_principle: Transportation programs flow to Part I Line 7e (CHIS) when Z75.3 documentation and health outcome evidence exists. Without evidence, defaults to Part II and does not count.

parity_benchmark.description: AHA estimates average nonprofit hospital tax exemption is 5.9% of total expenses. Community benefit expenditure averages 7.6% — but distribution varies widely.
parity_benchmark.source: AHA 2024 Community Benefit Report; IRS Statistics of Income

sdoh_projects.name: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT)
sdoh_projects.description: Scheduled transport for LMI patients to medical appointments, post-discharge follow-up, and chronic disease management visits

schedule_h.primary_line: Part I, Line 7e — Community Health Improvement Services
schedule_h.secondary_line: Part I, Line 7i — Cash/In-Kind Contributions to NEMT operators
schedule_h.key_requirement: Document Z75.3 + show rate improvement + CCM enrollment changes to qualify for Part I

cra.activity_type: Community Development Grant or CD Loan
cra.lmi_requirement: ≤80% AMI — verify via Medicaid enrollment, SNAP, income attestation
cra.qualification_basis: Community services targeted to LMI individuals (12 CFR §25.12(g))
cra.enumeration_gap: Healthcare transportation NOT on OCC Illustrative List — use HRSA designation + CHNA citation
cra.dollar_weighted_option: CD Loan for vehicle fleet or technology platform

measures_directly_impacted.name: Adults' Access to Preventive/Ambulatory Health Services
Comprehensive Diabetes Care — HbA1c control
measures_directly_impacted.impact: HIGH — each missed visit = poor control

ncqa_hedis.star_rating_impact: Moving CBP and CDC-HbA1c from 3★ to 4★ worth est. $1.8M-$3.2M in MA bonus revenue for a 10,000-member plan
ncqa_hedis.ncqa_health_equity: NCQA HE Accreditation requires SDOH screening and referral documentation — NEMT programs provide the referral pathway

cms_sdoh.hcc_uplift: Z55-Z65 documentation improves HCC capture; estimated $180-$220 risk score uplift per properly documented patient

sensitive_measures: TFU — Timely Follow-Up after acute exacerbation (direct NEMT sensitivity)

cms_sdoh.cms_innovation: CMS AHEAD model and accountable health communities grant programs explicitly fund NEMT as SDOH intervention

standards_addressed.name: Medical Record contains SDOH screening results
Leaders create and maintain a culture of safety and quality
Identify patients at risk for suicide (transitions of care)

joint_commission.community_care: JC Community Care Certification launched 2024 — NEMT programs directly support care coordination and transitions standards

aks_safe_harbor.distance_limits: ≤25mi urban / ≤75mi rural; NO limit for discharge-to-home (2020 exception)

hba1c_impact.note: Statistically significant but below 0.5% clinical threshold

evidence.critical_counterpoint: Chaiyachati RCT 2018: Universal untargeted programs show NO reduction. Targeting prior no-show history is ESSENTIAL.

sdoh_projects.name: Food Insecurity / Medically Tailored Meals
sdoh_projects.description: SDOH screening + medically tailored meal delivery for food-insecure patients with diet-sensitive chronic conditions
z_codes: Z72.4 — inappropriate diet and eating habits

evidence.hospital_readmissions: Medically tailored meals reduce 30-day readmissions by 16% (RR 0.84) — Berkowitz 2019 J Gen Intern Med
evidence.hba1c: MTM associated with 1.0% HbA1c reduction vs. standard care — Berkowitz 2019
evidence.cost: MTM saves $9.29 in healthcare costs per $1 spent — Berkowitz 2019

sdoh_projects.name: Housing Stability Navigation
sdoh_projects.description: Social worker-led housing navigation and rental/utility assistance for housing-unstable patients
z_codes: Z59.8 — other problems related to housing and economic circumstances

sdoh_projects.name: Behavioral Health Navigation & Warm Handoffs
sdoh_projects.description: Co-located BH screening, warm handoffs to community mental health, and care coordination for BH+medical comorbidities

measures_directly_impacted.name: Follow-Up After Hospitalization for Mental Illness
Adherence to Antipsychotic Medications for Schizophrenia

sdoh_projects.name: Chronic Disease Self-Management Education (CDSME)
sdoh_projects.description: Evidence-based Stanford CDSME programs, diabetes education (DSMES), and hypertension self-management

sdoh_projects.name: Maternal Health & Obstetric Support
sdoh_projects.description: Doula support, prenatal transportation, postpartum depression screening, and FQHC partnerships for LMI obstetric patients
z_codes: Z34.x — encounter for supervision of normal pregnancy
Z39.x — encounter for maternal postpartum care

measures_directly_impacted.name: Avoidance of Antibiotic Treatment for Acute Bronchitis/Bronchiolitis

sdoh_projects.name: Community Health Workers / Social Prescribing
sdoh_projects.description: CHW-led SDOH screening, community resource navigation, and social prescription for LMI patients with complex social needs
z_codes: Z55-Z65 — SDOH codes across all domains

sdoh_projects.name: Language Access & Health Literacy
sdoh_projects.description: Medical interpretation, translated materials, and health literacy programming for LEP populations

standards_addressed.name: Patient language documented in medical record

ncqa_accreditation.description: NCQA Health Plan Accreditation evaluates 60+ HEDIS measures. Star ratings directly impact MA revenue. NCQA Health Equity Accreditation launched 2023.

CDC.name: Comprehensive Diabetes Care
CDC.sdoh_link: HbA1c testing requires visit; NEMT enables

health_equity_accreditation.nemt_relevance: NEMT programs with Z75.3 documentation directly satisfy SDOH data collection and disparities reduction requirements

joint_commission.description: JC accreditation required for Medicare/Medicaid participation. Community Care Certification launched 2024 specifically for SDOH coordination.

community_care_certification.focus: Organizations providing SDOH navigation, care coordination, and community-clinical linkages
community_care_certification.nemt_relevance: NEMT programs with care coordination components directly qualify for Community Care Certification

key_standards.LD.04.03.01: Leaders support improvement of safety and quality — SDOH programs demonstrate community commitment
key_standards.PC.04.01.01: Discharge planning — NEMT directly ensures post-discharge follow-up execution
key_standards.NPSG.15.01.01: Suicide risk reduction — BH navigation + NEMT addresses access barriers to mental health follow-up

cms_sdoh.description: CMS has progressively embedded SDOH requirements across programs. ACO REACH 2026 5% quality withhold. IRA provisions expand SDOH coverage.

aco_reach.py2026_withhold: 5% of benchmark — $200K-$500K at stake for median ACO
aco_reach.nemt_direct_impact: TFU (Timely Follow-Up) is most directly NEMT-sensitive — measures outpatient visit within condition-specific window after acute discharge

ahead_model.description: CMS States Advancing All-Payer Health Equity Approaches and Development Model
ahead_model.sdoh_grants: Up to $12M per state for SDOH community investments including transportation

ahc_model.description: Accountable Health Communities — bridging clinical and community
ahc_model.track_c: Aligned — includes navigation for transportation, food, and housing for high-need beneficiaries

cra_2023.description: CRA final rule effective 2026 strengthens community development evaluation. Healthcare transportation as community service for LMI populations.
qualification_pathways: Community Development Grant to nonprofit health system NEMT fund
Community Development Loan for vehicle fleet or technology platform (dollar-weighted)
Community Development Service — staff hours for program governance or financial counseling
cra_2023.enumeration_status: NOT explicitly listed on OCC Illustrative List — examiner discretion. Mitigate with HRSA shortage designation + CHNA citation + LMI income documentation chain.
cra_2023.assessment_area: Activity must benefit the bank's defined assessment area. Confirm health system service area overlap before structuring.

parity_model.description: The tax exemption parity model: nonprofit hospitals receive tax benefits worth X but must document Y in community benefit. The parity gap is X-Y.

tax_exemption_components.state_income_tax: Varies by state — typically 5-8% of taxable income

community_benefit_minimum_defensible.note: IRS has not set a minimum, but academic literature and state advocacy groups use 5% as floor. Several states mandate minimum CB as condition of property tax exemption.

does_not_count: Part II community building without evidence-based outcomes
Medicare and Medicaid unreimbursed costs (some states differ)
